missing_requirements.evidence_quote: Once inside, they can do different things. They can view their medical history, get reminders to take medicines on time, get reminders to buy medicines when they are not in stock, schedule appointments, use the emergency button, write medical notes, or view medical notes.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall provide users with the ability to receive reminders for medication and reminders for medicine restocking.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: If they use the emergency button, emergency contacts are called.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention of calling emergency contacts in the source text. It only states that the emergency button exists.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: They can also simply read reminders, write notes, send the message, or call emergency contacts, and finish there.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not specify these actions as part of the user flow after using the app.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall allow users to update their medical history if they choose to do so after viewing it.
ambiguities.reason: The source text mentions updating medical notes but not necessarily the medical history.
